CrateDB: rolling-window queries build the time series with `FROM ... LATERAL
generate_series(...)`. CrateDB has generate_series but not LATERAL / correlated
table-function arguments (the non-Tesseract base query needs it here too).

CrateDB: rolling windows without an explicit date range build the time series
with `FROM ... LATERAL generate_series(...)`. CrateDB has generate_series but
does not support LATERAL / correlated table-function arguments, so this query
cannot be expressed. The variants with an explicit date range work.
